title: Manufacturing Engineer - Sika India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Sika India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Sika India are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Rajkot. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Sika India:
Sika India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sika India!
